summary: Group Deal Content Studio & Repeat Buyer features testing complete. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Group Deal checkout flow working with WhatsApp share. Sales Content Hub visible with Copy Caption buttons. Affiliate campaigns API returns group_deals with promo code injection.

issues: React key warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' for product- prefix - minor console warning

critical_code_review_comments: Group deal repeat buyer logic correctly implemented - only blocks same phone if pending_payment status exists
Quantity-based closure working - campaign becomes 'successful' when approved units reach target
Overflow allowed - units can exceed target without blocking
Sales campaigns endpoint returns group_deals array with promo code injection
Affiliate campaigns endpoint returns group_deals array with promo code injection
Group deal captions use amount-based format (Save TZS X) not percentage
WhatsApp share on checkout done page includes deal name, savings, units bought, progress
Creative generator service properly structures group_deals with all required fields

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Group Deal checkout flow, WhatsApp share, Sales Content Hub all working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Group Deal features fully tested: 1) Repeat buyer allowed if not pending_payment, 2) Blocked if pending_payment exists, 3) Quantity closure sets status='successful' when target reached, 4) Overflow allowed, 5) Sales/Affiliate campaigns endpoints return group_deals with promo code, 6) Captions use amount format (Save TZS X), 7) WhatsApp share includes deal info. Staff login via /staff-login, Affiliate API tested via curl.
